displayProperties.name: Support Frame
displayProperties.description: Capable of healing allies and hurting foes. Harming targets builds a restorative charge. Hip firing at allies while this weapon is charged heals them. Rapid healing increases weapon damage and bestows restoration to your allies.

If the dagger flies for long enough without impacting anything, it detonates and you blink to the detonation location.

displayProperties.name: Twilight Arsenal
displayProperties.description:
[Super]  : Summon three Void axes and throw them at your foes one after another. On impact, the axes pull in nearby targets and detonate in a weakening explosion. After exploding, the axes can be picked up by you or your allies and used as a weapon for a short time.

While carrying a Void axe:
[Light Attack]  : Slash forward with your axe, dealing damage and weakening targets.
[Heavy Attack]  : Throw the axe, consuming all remaining ammo.

displayProperties.name: Singular Mercenary Cloak
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Lavender Ribbon Cookies
displayProperties.description: Deliver these sweet and triumphant treats to Saint-14 in the Tower Hangar.

displayProperties.name: Veist Stinger
displayProperties.description: Damaging a combatant with this weapon has a small chance to reload the magazine and increase movement speed while aiming down sights by an improved amount. Bows receive improved draw speed, and Swords receive improved charge rate while this perk is active.

displayProperties.name: Arach's Chosen Fists

displayProperties.name: Reaper's Tithe

displayProperties.name: Fists of Havoc
displayProperties.description:
Supercharge your fists and slam the ground with the force of a maelstrom. While active:

[Light Attack]  : Quickly dash forward, dealing damage to any impacted targets.

[Heavy Attack]  : Slam your fists to the ground, blinding targets and dealing damage in an area around you, leaving aftershocks in your wake. Performing a slam from the air or after a dash deals additional damage.

A pared-down rail improves weapon usability.

  •  Increases persistence

displayProperties.name: Overflowing Light
displayProperties.description: Using an ability (grenade, melee, or Barricade) empowers the other two abilities. Empowered means abilities have faster regen, melees and grenades do more damage, and Barricades have more hit points.

displayProperties.name: Spoiler Alert
displayProperties.description: Equip this tier 5 weapon ornament to change the appearance of this weapon.

displayProperties.name: Replenishing Aegis
displayProperties.description: Blocking damage partially reloads this weapon from reserves.

displayProperties.name: Thunderclap
displayProperties.description:
[Melee] : Hold while grounded to plant your feet and begin charging your fist with Arc energy.

[Melee] : Release to unleash a devastating blast in front of you, dealing damage that increases with longer charge time.

displayProperties.name: Hoarfrost Sunrise
displayProperties.description: Apply this shader to change the color of your gear.

displayProperties.name: Property: Irreducible
displayProperties.description: [Alternate Weapon Action] : Consume your grenade to load a large [projectile|shape|language] that generates an elemental explosion on impact and deals increased damage while Transcendence is active.

displayProperties.name: Unstoppable Party Mechanism
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament to change the appearance of Radiant Dance Machines. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Rocket Launcher Loader
displayProperties.description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

displayProperties.name: Unsated Hunger
displayProperties.description:
Increased handling, reload speed, and stability when no abilities are fully charged.

Swords gain increased guard resistance and charge rate instead.

displayProperties.name: Lucky Shot
displayProperties.description: Reloading after a precision final blow causes precision hits to refill a round from reserves.

displayProperties.name: +Health / -Weapons
displayProperties.description: Increases this armor's Tuned stat at the cost of a small amount of the Weapons stat.

displayProperties.name: Herd Thinner
displayProperties.description:
This mod's perks are only active in the "Deep Stone Crypt" raid.

Multiple copies of this mod stack and improve its effects.
